openmeter/watermill/driver/kafka.purpose: Low-level Kafka driver providing NewPublisher and NewSubscriber factories over IBM Sarama + watermill-kafka, with SASL/SSL auth, OTel tracing, partition-key routing, and OTel-bridged metrics. All Sarama internals are hidden behind these two constructors; the metrics/ child bridges Sarama's go-metrics to an OTel meter.

patterns.name: BrokerOptions as shared config root
patterns.description: Both PublisherOptions and SubscriberOptions embed BrokerOptions; call Validate() before any construction — it requires non-nil KafkaConfig, ClientID, Logger, and MetricMeter.
patterns.example: if err := o.Broker.Validate(); err != nil { return nil, err }

patterns.name: Role suffix on ClientID
patterns.description: createKafkaConfig(role) appends 'publisher' or 'subscriber' to ClientID so broker logs distinguish producers from consumers.

patterns.name: OTel tracing via the global provider
patterns.description: PublisherConfig always sets Tracer: kafka.NewOTELSaramaTracer(), relying on the global trace provider — do not pass a custom tracer.

patterns.name: Partition-key routing via marshalerWithPartitionKey
patterns.description: The Publisher always uses marshalerWithPartitionKey{} (wraps DefaultMarshaler); set msg.Metadata[PartitionKeyMetadataKey]=subject (helper AddPartitionKeyFromSubject) to route. The Subscriber intentionally uses DefaultMarshaler.

patterns.name: SaramaMetricRenamer drops high-cardinality metrics
patterns.description: Metrics containing 'for-broker' or 'for-topic' are dropped; survivors are prefixed 'sarama.' and tagged with {role}. New metrics must fit this filter or add an explicit Drop rule.
patterns.example: SaramaMetricRenamer(role) // passed to metrics.NewRegistry as NameTransformFn

patterns.name: Topic provisioning is Publisher-side
patterns.description: TopicProvisioner.Provision(ctx, ProvisionTopics...) runs inside NewPublisher before kafka.NewPublisher, so topics exist before the publisher is returned.
patterns.example: if err = in.TopicProvisioner.Provision(ctx, in.ProvisionTopics...); err != nil { return nil, err }

key_file_guides.role: BrokerOptions + createKafkaConfig — the shared sarama.Config builder owning all SASL/TLS, metric-registry, and ClientID logic.
key_file_guides.watch_for: MetricMeter must be non-nil (metrics.NewRegistry errors otherwise); createKafkaConfig always sets ApiVersionsRequest=false to suppress log spam.

key_file_guides.role: NewPublisher: validates, createKafkaConfig("publisher"), provisions topics, constructs kafka.Publisher.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Must use marshalerWithPartitionKey{} — DefaultMarshaler silently breaks partition routing.

key_file_guides.role: NewSubscriber: validates, createKafkaConfig("subscriber"), sets defaultMaxProcessingTime (5 min), constructs kafka.Subscriber.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Uses kafka.DefaultMarshaler{} intentionally (no partition key); ConsumerGroupName must not be empty.

key_file_guides.role: marshalerWithPartitionKey promotes PartitionKeyMetadataKey from message metadata to sarama.ProducerMessage.Key; AddPartitionKeyFromSubject sets the metadata.
key_file_guides.watch_for: The metadata key is stripped from Kafka headers after promotion to avoid double-encoding.

key_file_guides.role: SaramaMetricRenamer returns the OTel name-transform that drops per-broker/topic metrics and prefixes survivors with 'sarama.'.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Per-broker/per-topic metric names are dropped unconditionally — do not rely on them for observability.
Only used when SecurityProtocol==SASL_SSL and SaslMechanisms is SCRAM-SHA-256/512.

key_file_guides.role: SaramaLoggerAdaptor bridging sarama.Logger/DebugLogger to slog, set inside createKafkaConfig.
key_file_guides.watch_for: These are global sarama variables — setting them affects every sarama client in the process.

anti_patterns: Building *sarama.Config directly instead of calling createKafkaConfig — loses SASL/TLS, metric registry, and ClientID suffix.
Using kafka.DefaultMarshaler{} in PublisherConfig — partition-key routing silently stops working.
Skipping TopicProvisioner.Provision before publishing — topics may not exist in the cluster.
Setting a nil MetricMeter in BrokerOptions — metrics.NewRegistry errors and construction fails.
Adding per-broker/per-topic metric labels without a Drop rule in SaramaMetricRenamer — unbounded OTel label cardinality.

decisions.decision: marshalerWithPartitionKey wraps DefaultMarshaler rather than replacing it.
decisions.rationale: Reuses all existing serialisation logic and only adds the key-promotion step, keeping the delta minimal and auditable.

decisions.decision: The OTel metrics registry is injected into sarama.Config.MetricRegistry via the metrics/ child.
decisions.rationale: Bridges Sarama's go-metrics interface to OTel without patching Sarama; SaramaMetricRenamer drops high-cardinality names before export.

decisions.decision: Topic provisioning is a Publisher-side responsibility.
decisions.rationale: Callers pass ProvisionTopics; NewPublisher ensures topics exist before the publisher is usable, preventing publish-time errors.

code_examples.scenario: Construct a Publisher with SASL_SSL and OTel metrics
